category_sources: source_facts.description says ibex is a C++ library for constraint processing over real numbers; official GitHub README describes nonlinear constraints, interval arithmetic, solving, and global optimization.
display_name_sources: Official documentation at https://ibex-team.github.io/ibex-lib/ uses the title IBEX documentation.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to https://ibex-team.github.io/ibex-lib/ as the project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ibex-team/ibex-lib, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe C++ constraint processing, interval arithmetic, solving, and global optimization.
